feed.title: sbozich
feed.subtitle: This is a personal webpage outlining my thoughts about stuff I find interesting.

entry.title: C# Mini Project - Library Management System program detailed overview

link.title: C# Mini Project - Library Management System program detailed overview

entry.summary: In this mini project, we will be creating a program in c# which serves as a Library Management System, enabling the basic functions of one such system. In particular, there are separate records of a books, books’ categories, authors, publishers, library members, as well as the records on book issues and returns. It is in fact a Windows Forms GUI program connected to the underlying database in M...

entry.title: Adding functionality to Windows Sandbox
entry.summary: Adding functionality to Windows Sandbox Windows Sandbox is a fast, functional and effective virtual environment introduced in 2019. It is mostly delivered as-is, albeit Microsoft added some configurability in 2020, with Windows 10 build 18342 and newer, or Windows 11. Configuration files Configuration files of Windows Sandbox have .wsb file extension, they are formatted as XML and enable contr...

entry.title: Windows Sandbox overview - Enabling, Features, Usability, Security

link.title: Windows Sandbox overview - Enabling, Features, Usability, Security

entry.summary: Over the time, Windows 10 got some useful features that are not always obvious or even enabled. Many users are not even aware of their existence. When it comes to productivity, it turns out that the Windows for some time sports a fully-fledged virtualization engine (called Hyper-V) and an instant-sandbox called simply Windows Sandbox. In this article we will take a closer look at the Windows Sa...

entry.title: C# Mini Project - Car Rental program detailed overview

link.title: C# Mini Project - Car Rental program detailed overview

entry.summary: In this article, we will be reviewing a simple Windows program which can be used to manage a car rental company. The program is synced to a MS SQL Server database and it features basic features like registration of cars and customers, tracking of rentals and returns. Front-end uses Windows Forms UI framework and the development is done in Visual Studio. The source code is available at this l...

entry.title: Why (not) study IT – my thoughts
entry.summary: Having just earned my bachelor’s degree in computer science, I wanted to outline and summarize the pros and contras of pursuing IT studies (or any studies for that matter) in the 2022. This is my second bachelor so obviously I was inclined to study in the past, but for the somewhat odd reasons. Moreover, if I was today thinking of enrolling, I would probably not do it. Here is the quick recap o...
